applicabilityConditions: Current resource deployment is not aligned with the highest-priority work or productive use.
recommendedAction: Reduce or reallocate resources toward the highest-priority work while preserving focused investment.
nonApplicabilityConditions: Current allocation remains aligned with priority work and productive use.
guardrails: Preserve focused investment and execution continuity while changing headcount or cost structure.
exceptions: Retain resources when removal would impair a verified high-priority opportunity.
reversalSignals: Priority alignment improves, productivity recovers, or reductions begin to impair focused investment.

review.rationale: Reviewed against approved same-axis reflections, source-linked Amy Hood principle evidence, holdout boundaries, explicit guardrails, reversal signals, and five-domain PoC coverage; approved at medium confidence.
